title: Source Stratification (S1-S5 + Pending) — US
description: Schema for source-stratified citations in US-equity IC memos. Every specific number (revenue, GM, segment share, customer concentration, capacity, ADV, beta, etc.) MUST carry one of these tags at first appearance per the discipline in references/source-stratification-us.md. Ported and Americanized from china-equity-ic-rigor. v0.2.0 adds optional `consensus_variance` block tied to gate G15. v0.3.0 adds optional up_revisions_3m + down_revisions_3m fields to revision_velocity for G17 breadth recomputation; consensus_variance entries can include probability_right_pct and scenario_sensitivity_pct for G15 sizing_impact_pp recomputation.

s_level.description: S1=audited 10-K/20-F (PCAOB-audited, SOX 404). S2=10-Q/8-K/DEF 14A/S-1/S-3/S-4/13D/13G/13F/Form 4/6-K. S3=earnings call transcript, mgmt guidance, investor day, IR commentary. S4=Visible Alpha/FactSet/Bloomberg/Refinitiv IBES consensus, sell-side notes; or free aggregator (Yahoo Finance, StockAnalysis.com). S5=Gartner/IDC/IHS Markit/Counterpoint/Omdia/Yipit/Second Measure/Placer.ai/expert network. Pending=unverified, rumor, post-cutoff unverified — CANNOT be a headline anchor.

us_source_type.description: Document/data type. Drives default S-level via decision rule: any 10-K/20-F = S1; 10-Q/8-K/DEF14A/etc = S2; transcript/guidance = S3; consensus aggregator = S4; alt-data/expert network = S5.

ref.description: Specific reference. Examples: 'NVDA 2024 10-K Item 7', 'NVDA FY24Q3 10-Q Note 4', 'NVDA FY24Q4 earnings call 2025-02-26 ~22min mark', 'Visible Alpha NVDA DC rev FY26E n=42 median $X range $Y-$Z', 'Gartner DC GPU forecast 2026/03', 'OFAC SDN list query 2026-05-14'

url.description: EDGAR direct URL (sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?...) or primary-source URL. Required for any S1-S2 citation.

verified.description: True if cross-cutoff verification confirmed via WebSearch/WebFetch within the current run. Required true for any post-knowledge-cutoff S1-S5 number.

verification_query.description: The exact WebSearch query string or EDGAR full-text search query used

freshness_days.description: Days between source publication date and memo author date. S4 consensus freshness_days > 14 should be flagged.

is_anchor_eligible.description: True if eligible to be a headline anchor. Default: true for S1-S2; false for S3-S5 unless reinforced by independent source; always false for Pending.

promotion_path.description: For S3-S5: what verifiable event would graduate to a stronger S-level (e.g., 'Next 10-Q filing 2026-08-15 expected to confirm segment split').

anchor.description: A specific number that drives the headline thesis. The top 3 anchors determine headline conditionality.

anchor_id.description: Short ID like 'A1', 'B2', etc. used for cross-reference in scenario table

claim.description: Plain-English claim, e.g. 'NVDA Q4 FY26 datacenter revenue', 'NVDA Hopper-to-Blackwell ASP uplift', 'NVDA gross margin guide ex-mix'

unit.description: Unit of the value. Note: $M vs $B confusion is a B1-class forensic bug — be explicit.

drives_scenarios.description: Which scenarios this anchor drives. An anchor that drives 'base' but not 'bull' is a base-case fixture; an anchor that drives 'strong_bull' and not 'base' is a tail-only assumption.

sensitivity_pct.description: Approximate % change in headline 12mo expected return per 10% change in this anchor's value. Useful for the anchor weighting impact table.

model_cutoff_date.description: The Claude knowledge cutoff used at run time. Anchors dated after this require verified=true.

all_citations.description: Every specific number cited in the memo, in order of first appearance. Used by verify_source_tags.py to scan memo Markdown for unsourced specifics.

top_anchors.description: The top 3-5 anchors that drive the headline thesis. The first three determine headline conditionality per Rule 1 in source-stratification-us.md.

headline_conditionality.description: Computed from top-3 anchors: 'unconditional' if all S1-S2; 'source_conditional' if any S3 in top-3; 'range_only' if any S4-S5 in top-3. Verified by verify_headline_conditionality.py (Phase C).

pending_assumptions.description: Pending (unverified) claims explicitly excluded from headline anchoring. Allowed in 'Pending Assumptions' section of memo; never in headline or scenario weighting.

consensus_variance.description: (v0.2.0+) Declared consensus variances per `consensus-variance-us.md`. Gates G15. Required (non-empty with ≥1 load-bearing entry) for any non-Hold rating unless memo is self-labeled 'consensus-anchored' in headline. Empty array OR absent is valid for Hold-rated or consensus-anchored memos.

variance_id.description: Short ID like 'V1', 'V2' used for cross-reference in scenarios.

type.description: Variance type per the taxonomy in consensus-variance-us.md.

line_item.description: Specific line: 'FY27 datacenter revenue', 'FY26 gross margin', 'forward P/E', 'bull scenario probability', 'Pioneer synergy run-rate timing'.

unit.description: Unit of the value: $M, $B, %, x, months, etc. Same unit conventions as anchors.

magnitude_pct.description: Magnitude of disagreement as percent (signed: positive if our number > consensus; negative if our number < consensus).

probability_right_pct.description: Analyst's subjective probability of being right vs consensus. Range-bound 5%-95% — outside this range is over-claim.

scenario_sensitivity_pct.description: % NPV impact per 10% change in this line item (from anchor sensitivity_pct in the same memo's source_tags).

sizing_impact_pp.description: Computed: magnitude_pct × probability_right_pct × scenario_sensitivity_pct. Variances with <2.0pp are decorative and fail G15 if claimed as load-bearing.

evidence_refs.description: Supporting citations. Must satisfy the evidence matrix in consensus-variance-us.md: revenue/margin = ≥1× S2 or S3 + triangulation; multiple = peer-set re-rating mechanism + historical precedent; scenario_weight = base-rate analysis from analog set; timing = ≥1× S2/S3 docket + operational mechanism.

why_consensus_missed.description: One-sentence operational mechanism explaining why consensus has not yet incorporated this evidence. E.g. 'Street's last EPS revision was pre-call; the call transcript revealed the deposit beta inflection.'

drives_scenarios.description: Which scenario weights this variance shifts.

red_team_challenge.description: Specific falsification criterion + the trigger event/date that would resolve the variance. Required for R-v2 to attack.

load_bearing.description: True if sizing_impact_pp ≥ 2.0 AND ≥1 evidence_ref is S1-S3. False = decorative variance, not counted for G15.

revision_velocity.description: (v0.2.0+) Earnings revision velocity snapshot per A6 + G17. Required disclosure when n_analysts >= 5. All numbers are S4-derived (FactSet / Visible Alpha / Bloomberg EE / free aggregator).

fy1_eps_revision_1m_pct.description: % change in consensus FY1 EPS median over trailing 30 days

fy1_eps_revision_3m_pct.description: % change in consensus FY1 EPS median over trailing 90 days. Primary momentum window.

fy1_eps_revision_6m_pct.description: % change in consensus FY1 EPS median over trailing 180 days

pt_revision_3m_pct.description: % change in consensus PT median over trailing 90 days

breadth_3m.description: (up_revisions - down_revisions) / n_analysts over trailing 90 days. |breadth| > 0.5 = directional consensus shift.

up_revisions_3m.description: (v0.3.0+) Count of analysts who revised FY1 EPS estimate UP in trailing 90 days. Optional, but if both up_revisions_3m and down_revisions_3m are populated alongside n_analysts, G17 (v0.3.0) recomputes breadth_3m = (up - down) / N and verifies match within ±0.02.

down_revisions_3m.description: (v0.3.0+) Count of analysts who revised FY1 EPS estimate DOWN in trailing 90 days. Used in G17 breadth recomputation when paired with up_revisions_3m and n_analysts.

pre_print_drift_pct.description: FY1 EPS revision in the 30 days before the most recent earnings print. Pre-print is higher-information than post-print snap.

peer_median_revision_3m_pct.description: Peer-set median 3m FY1 EPS revision for comparison.

bank_metrics.description: (v0.2.0+) Bank-specific metrics per FS-Banks Augmentation in phase-1-deep-dive-us.md + G16. Required disclosure when sector ∈ {Financials/Banks, Diversified Banks, Regional Banks, Investment Banking & Brokerage, Insurance, BDC}. All numbers S1 (10-K), S2 (10-Q / Y-9C / Call Report / Fed releases) unless noted.

bank_category.description: Category I-IV per US bank tailoring rules. below_100b = community bank tier. n_a_non_depository = broker-dealer / insurer / BDC.

htm_unrealized_loss_usd_b.description: Computed: htm_book - htm_fair. Not in AOCI but real economic loss.

tbvps_mtm_usd.description: Reported TBVPS less HTM unrealized loss × (1-tax) / diluted shares

svb_pattern_flag.description: True if HTM unrealized loss > 25% TCE AND uninsured concentration > 60%.

cet1_ratio_pro_forma_no_opt_out_pct.description: Only for AOCI opt-out banks; required CET1 if opt-out reversed.

scb_pct.description: Stress Capital Buffer from Fed determination letter.

gsib_surcharge_pct.description: Category I only; higher of Method 1 / Method 2.

nim_5y_trajectory.description: Trailing quarterly NIM values, oldest first.

asset_repricing_12m_pct.description: % of earning assets repricing within 12 months.

rate_sensitive_deposits_pct.description: MMA + HY savings + brokered as % of total deposits.

basel_iii_endgame_status.description: Free-text status as of memo date — 'In final rule review', 'Effective YYYY-MM-DD, phase-in to YYYY', etc.
